title: Tribute Page
description: Ek mahan vyakti ko shradhanjali (tribute) dene ke liye page.
guide:
Project 2: Tribute Page

Is project me hum ek simple layout banayenge jisme:

  • Ek badi Image hogi.
  • Unke baare me Text hoga.
  • Unki life ki Timeline (List) hogi.

Ye project aapko Images aur Lists ko sahi se use karna sikhayega.
